plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**Root cause:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts` at line 7.

```ts
// BUGGY — stops one iteration early
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {

// FIX — remove the "- 1"
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

The `- 1` in the loop bound means for an array of length `N`, the loop only visits indices `0` through `N-2`, completely skipping the last element.

**Impact:** 3 of the 4 `processItems` tests are currently failing:
| Test | Expected | Actual (buggy) |
|---|---|---|
| single item `["test"]` | `["TEST"]` | `[]` |
| two items `["a","b"]` | `["A","B"]` | `["A"]` |
| three items `["hello","world","foo"]` | `["HELLO","WORLD","FOO"]` | `["HELLO","WORLD"]` |

**Fix:** Remove `- 1` from the loop condition in `src/utils.ts` (one character change). All 6 tests should pass after the fix.
